description_long: This house is situated on a rectangular plot with a mix of green lawn and paved areas, surrounded by other building footprints. The main structure is a two-story building with a gable roof, painted white, and features a smaller, attached section with a red roof. The property includes a driveway or path leading to the entrance, and the house is bordered by a blue line that may represent a waterway or property boundary. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the entryway is marked by a small porch or stoop. The surrounding area is depicted with neighboring lots and structures, giving the impression of a suburban or semi-urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof and a smaller red-roofed section, set on a green and paved lot among other buildings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the main white structure, the red-roofed section, and the green yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from a lower angle, emphasizing the green lawn and the arrangement of neighboring lots.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite side, showing the blue boundary line and more of the surrounding yellow building footprints.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear perspective, revealing the back of the house and the extent of the green area behind it.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a small porch or stoop, no columns, and a single main door
